content: Eswar Divi is a student majoring in Computer science with Artificial Intelligence. He has a strong academic background and a proven track record of success in developing innovative AI solutions. He is particularly interested in image processing, generative AI, and natural language processing (NLP). In his most recent project, he developed a Transformer-based Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) system specifically designed for low-resource languages. He is also excited about the potential of his rainfall forecasting project to contribute to advancements in weather forecasting. He is confident that he can use his skills and experience to make a significant impact in the field of AI.
summary: Eswar Divi is a student majoring in Computer science with Artificial Intelligence. He is particularly interested in image processing, generative AI, and natural language processing (NLP).
title: Divi Eswar Chowdary
